title: Mike Shah Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Mike Shah Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Mike Shah
Khoury Faculty
PhD in Computer Science, Tufts University
Associate Teaching Professor
As a pre-teen, playing video games wasn’t enough for Mike Shah; he needed to know how to make them himself. His first experiments in programming evolved into a larger fascination with tech, eventually leading him to a career in research and teaching, one where he makes sure to learn from his students.
“We have to keep ourselves up to date as well with what’s going on in what we’re teaching. So I try to bring in a lot of industry folks into the classroom as well. It’s always evolving
Mike Shah, Associate Teaching Professor
Explore all Khoury Stories
